title: Research department: competitor digest
request_summary: every morning check competitor news and send a Slack digest only if something changed

storage_intent.requested_capability: persist source inboxes, notes, briefs, and unresolved verification gaps
storage_intent.boundary: A knowledge-store preference is not write evidence or proof that the store is configured.

knowledge_store.requested_capability: persist source inboxes, notes, briefs, and unresolved verification gaps
knowledge_store.boundary: A knowledge-store preference is not write evidence or proof that the store is configured.

synthesis_tool.requested_capability: summarize curated sources, surface conflicts, and preserve missing evidence
synthesis_tool.boundary: A synthesis-tool preference is not query evidence or proof that the tool is configured.

roles.label: Scout
roles.responsibility: Collect source candidates and raw findings without claiming retrieval until observed.

roles.label: Analyst
roles.responsibility: Synthesize processed notes, conflicts, confidence, and missing evidence.

roles.label: Briefer
roles.responsibility: Prepare a digest, report, or meeting brief with unresolved gaps visible.

skill_chain.reason: cadence and delivery policy when recurring

source_inbox.boundary: Empty or prepared inbox buckets are not source retrieval, synthesis, storage, or verification evidence.

briefing_status.headline: Research department workflow prepared
next: confirm topic, source boundaries, cadence, delivery, and storage
record observed source retrieval before claiming collected findings
record observed synthesis or human review before marking briefs verified

knowledge_store.requested_capability: persist source inboxes, notes, briefs, and unresolved verification gaps
knowledge_store.boundary: A knowledge-store preference is not write evidence or proof that the store is configured.

synthesis_tool.requested_capability: summarize curated sources, surface conflicts, and preserve missing evidence
synthesis_tool.boundary: A synthesis-tool preference is not query evidence or proof that the tool is configured.

prompt_outline.system_intent: Hermes should prepare a research operations workflow, not claim the research has already run.
prompt_outline.operator_prompt: Prepare a research department workflow for: every morning check competitor news and send a Slack digest only if something changed. Use skills: research-department, web-research, research-brief, report-package, automation-blueprint. Map Scout to collection, Analyst to synthesis, and Briefer to reporting. Keep collected, synthesized, briefed, delivered, and verified states separate.
missing_decisions: confirm knowledge-store destination and optional synthesis-tool readiness

required_runtime_capabilities: Hermes research workflow skills for source scoping, synthesis, and status narration.
Observed source retrieval or supplied source artifacts before content claims.
A Hermes/governed scheduler only if the operator wants recurring wakeups.
optional_runtime_capabilities: A synthesis tool for curated knowledge summarization when the operator has configured one.
A knowledge store for persistent source inboxes, notes, and briefs when the operator has configured one.
Gateway delivery evidence when briefs leave the current Hermes thread.
observed_evidence_required: Observed source retrieval records or supplied source artifacts before claiming collected findings.
Observed synthesis-tool output before claiming knowledge summarization or workspace queries.
Observed knowledge-store write records before claiming persistent notes, inboxes, or briefs were saved.
Hermes host automation or cron listing before claiming scheduled wakeups.
Gateway or Hermes message delivery record before claiming a brief was delivered.
Human or verifier review record before claiming conflicts or source quality are verified.
prepared_is_not: A research-department plan is projection metadata only. It is not source retrieval, synthesis-tool execution, knowledge-store writes, host cron creation, gateway delivery, human verification, connector invocation, or brief delivery evidence.
next_action: Present the research department plan in Hermes, confirm topic/source/cadence/storage, then record source retrieval, synthesis, storage, and delivery only from observed evidence.
